revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-4-095

Alternative term: Lamp Exchanger (G.B.)

A mechanism, usually operated automatically, which replaces one lamp by another in service in a light.

Most usually this is done when the first lamp has failed in service.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig10.jpg|400px|border]]


{{IALAFooter}}
